Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Seisha]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — Wei Shi Seisha is Lindon's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Seisha is Lindon's mother and has long brown hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Seisha uses a drudge that can absorb items like chalk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Seisha takes notes on a scroll using a brush and ink jar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — Seisha is the mother of Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — Seisha has brown eyes that are lighter than anyone else's in the clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — Seisha is Wei Shi Seisha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — Seisha is in charge of the arena staff while it is under construction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Seisha tells Lindon to keep his eyes open and learn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Shi Seisha reached the Iron stage in her twenty-second year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Seisha is accompanied by a guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Seisha is in a cold sweat due to the Li clan's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Seisha is near the Grand Patriarch of the Li clan when he settles on the forest floor.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Wei Shi Seisha is a Soulsmith who is believed to be alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Wei Shi Seisha is a Soulsmith.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Wei Shi Seisha has a drudge that is a brown segmented fish made of dead matter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Seisha is adjusting settings on her drudge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Seisha sketches.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Seisha is studying the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Seisha uses a drudge with sensors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Seisha observed a technique that was controlled directly by one person.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Seisha is the wife of Wei Shi Jaran.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Seisha insisted that they follow Lindon's instructions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Seisha uses launcher constructs.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Seisha carries scripted packages.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Seisha is Lindon's mother.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
